## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo pipeline` passes locally.
- [ ] New behavior has test coverage.
- [ ] User-facing changes are reflected in `CHANGELOG.md` (under `[Unreleased]`).
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`). See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#signing-your-work).
